import subprocess,hashlib,os
scratch=r'C:/Users/daish/v3-baseline-scratch/v3-arm-a-run-3-owner'

assert tree=='27b7d8f9e7c7b7bccce5d47ce991c92a6e3fea71', tree
h=hashlib.sha256(open(scratch+'/fixtures/architecture_drift_compliant.checks.json','rb').read()).hexdigest()
assert h=='16642a46a363b10ccb53f74bd0efdf027b47d08c39726259c5c86c08b5659065', h
st=subprocess.run(['git','-C',scratch,'status','--short'],capture_output=True,text=True,check=True).stdout.strip()
assert st=='', st
L=open('artifacts/evidence/test-results/launcher-no-governance-baseline-v3-a3-owner-20260711.ps1',encoding='utf-8').read()
assert 'v3-arm-a-run-3-owner' in L and 'v3-a3-20260711' in L and 'gpt-5.6-terra' in L and 'PreventBreakaway' in L and '26.707.3748.0' in L
for sfx in ('jsonl','stderr.txt','result.json'):
    assert not os.path.exists(f'artifacts/evidence/test-results/raw-no-governance-baseline-v3-a3-20260711.{sfx}')
print('A3 anchors + launcher verified; outputs absent; api_call_performed=false')
"
